ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Your account was credited with $1,234.56
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We wish to inform you that a transaction of $1,234.56 has been credited to your account ending in 5678 on March 15, 2026. Please review the details below:

- Amount: $1,234.56
- Date: 2026-03-15
- Transaction ID: TXN123456789

If you did not initiate this transaction or notice any discrepancies, please contact our customer support immediately.

Thank you for banking with XYZ Bank.

Sincerely,
XYZ Bank Customer Support

spam.subject: Your Income Tax Refund is Ready – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Mr./Ms. [Last Name],

We are pleased to inform you that the Income Tax Department has approved a refund of INR 12,34,567.00 to your account. Please verify your details and complete the necessary steps to receive your refund within 48 hours.

1. Confirm the amount and account details.
2. Upload the required documents through the secure portal.

<URL>.

Failure to comply may result in your refund being withheld. For any queries, contact us at 0123-456-7890 or reply to this email.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
